---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for AegisGate Lens
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve. Ex.: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Privacy impact

How does this feature interact with the 12 non-negotiables in the Privacy Policy? If it would require sending a new field to the backend, please describe the field and justify it. If it would require a new third-party dependency, please justify it — note that the no-`npm` rule is a hard contribution gate.

## Tier scope

AegisGate Lens has multiple tiers (free, Teams, Business). Which tier should this feature be in? (See the Pricing section of the [AegisGate marketing site](https://aegisgatesecurity.io) for the current tier list.)

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
